title: Appendix A (Reconciliation Lock) — evidence cross-link + gate-aligned submission
summary: This submission indexes the Appendix A evidence packet for Phase 0 (P0-01 tenant isolation + P0-02 money model lock) and ties it to a gate-aligned review-input for peer review. It does not claim production validation; it links local proof artifacts and explicitly records uncertainty boundaries.

scenarios.scenario: Concurrent settlement attempts do not create duplicate financial effects (DB uniqueness/idempotency based).
scenarios.expected_behavior: Duplicate attempts converge on a single transaction/application set; no double-application; invoice settlement derives from ledger.
scenarios.verification_method: Reference local proof logs for P0-02C webhook ingest + P0-02E sweep convergence; confirm dedupe-based overlap model is explicitly stated.

scenarios.scenario: Webhook replay or duplicate delivery does not create duplicate financial effects.
scenarios.expected_behavior: Replayed events are idempotent; existing provider references block duplicate transactions/applications.
scenarios.verification_method: Reference P0-02C local proof log and evidence doc.

scenarios.scenario: Wrong/mismatched tenant context is rejected for public-pay/public endpoints.
scenarios.expected_behavior: Tenant mismatch fails hard; no fallback tenant selection; token-derived tenant is authoritative.
scenarios.verification_method: Reference P0-01 negative test outputs and tenant mismatch rejection behavior in public endpoints.

scenarios.scenario: Stripe/webhook delivery timing or dependency degradation does not corrupt settlement truth.
scenarios.expected_behavior: System remains pending until webhook arrives; reconciliation/sweep flags drift without mutating totals; ledger truth remains authoritative.
scenarios.verification_method: Reference P0-02E reconciliation tooling + sweep logs; verify recovery routes through canonical webhook pipeline with deterministic ids.

scenarios.scenario: Offline/manual payment writer is duplicate-safe and reference-validated (prevents accidental double-recording).
scenarios.expected_behavior: Manual payment path is idempotent/duplicate-safe and settlement-backed; legacy money writes are blocked or routed through canonical ledger primitives.
scenarios.verification_method: Reference P0-02B local proof logs and evidence doc.

guarantees: Financial uniqueness is enforced by DB constraints + deterministic provider references; duplicate attempts converge without double financial effect.
non_guarantees: Duplicate attempts may still occur (no single-worker guarantee); logs/alerts may see multiple attempts unless explicitly deduped at the edge.

derivation_inputs: Referenced code paths include supabase/functions/public-* and payment writer migrations/RPCs

uncertainty_boundaries: No new production artifacts are included in this submission.
No new DB queries were executed during this documentation indexing run.
Manual UX evidence (EV-2026-03-18) may be stale relative to current UI; it is treated as historical context only.

findings.title: Evidence packet is local-proof only (no production validation claim)
findings.business_impact: Prevents premature production readiness claims and keeps review aligned to the gate/readiness schema.
findings.recommended_action: Keep production validation gated to ticket P0-02-PROD-VALIDATION and ensure any future money/tenant changes regenerate artifacts and re-run review:gate.
findings.verification_method: Confirm gate schema: readiness.labels allow only P0-02 LOCAL/PRODUCTION validated labels and production validated requires production_artifacts[].

verification.tenant_boundary_analysis: See EV-2026-04-04_P0-01_tenant-isolation-lock.md and tmp/p0-01-tenant-isolation-test.log for negative tenant mismatch coverage.
verification.idempotency_analysis: See EV-2026-04-04_P0-02C_payment-webhook-rebuild.md and tmp/p0-02c-payment-webhook-test.log for dual idempotency proofs.
verification.rollback_plan: Rollback is documented as: do not claim production validated; production rollback plan is deferred to P0-02-PROD-VALIDATION run artifacts.
